pkgmetadata.longdescription:
rust-analyzer is the reference Rust LSP server. opencode auto-detects it for .rs files, providing diagnostics, go-to-definition, hover documentation, and code completion. Requires a Rust toolchain (dev-lang/rust or dev-lang/rust-bin) at runtime.
Upstream uses date-based release tags (YYYY-MM-DD); the Portage version is the same date without separators (YYYYMMDD).
